## Why This Is a Good First Issue
- [ ] Clear scope with defined start and end
- [ ] Minimal codebase knowledge required
- [ ] Tests exist or are easy to add
- [ ] Mentor available if needed

## Getting Started
1. Read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md)
2. Set up your dev environment
3. Find the relevant files (listed below)
